test.command: pnpm -C packages/shared exec vitest run src/delivery-loop/domain/failure-signature.test.ts src/delivery-loop/store/dispatch-intent-store.test.ts && pnpm -C apps/www exec vitest run src/server-lib/delivery-loop/v3/reducer.test.ts src/server-lib/delivery-loop/v3/process-effects.test.ts src/app/api/daemon-event/route.test.ts && pnpm -C apps/www exec vitest run src/server-lib/e2e.test.ts

appliedUpdates.description: Fixed 2 TypeScript errors in apps/www/src/server/orpc/cli-router.ts: errors.UNAUTHORIZED() and errors.INTERNAL_ERROR() required object arguments with message property
